# the column header / row gutter / cell helpers all consult
# Initial state: pointer A1, no scroll.  Verify content is where we
# Vertical scroll: drive pointer down past the visible body.  The
# default 25-line buffer leaves ~21 body rows after the panel +
# header + status; pressing DOWN 30 times forces the viewport offset
# past row 2.  Frozen rows 0 and 1 should stay visible.
# Frozen rows 0 and 1 still visible (anchored at the top).
# Pointer's row IS in the visible region — its content paints on the
# same line.  Frozen-column A still visible too: the row-31 left
# Return to A1 and horizontal-scroll test.
# Drive pointer right past the visible body.  ~8 cols fit at width 80;
# RIGHT 20 puts pointer at col 20 (U), forcing horizontal scroll.
# Frozen column A still visible.  A1 = "TL"; A5 = "R5" both anchored
